en: And if it came in the nose, nose, in the back then I couldn't remember
ja: 思い出せた そしてそれが
zhTW: 我能記得 如果它裝在
vi: Toi co the nho Va neu no nam trong

en: And if it dripped from my wrist and it looked like it shined like blue then I couldn't remember
ja: 青く輝いて見えたなら
zhTW: 看起來像藍色光芒的話
vi: Va no trong nhu toa sang mau xanh thi

en: But oh girl, I forgot to be a lover
ja: 恋人であることを忘れてた
vi: Toi quen mat la mot nguoi yeu

en: If it wasn't for the 9 to 5, doubled up overtime then I couldn't remember
If it wasn't for the Sunday all-star weekend game, girl, I couldn't remember
And if it wasn't for the dough, didn't fit the Jesus show, girl, you know that I couldn't remember
ko: 나를 보지 마 50 예수 쇼, 그대, 알잖아

en: But silly me, silly me, oh, tell me how could I ever forget to be your lover
ja: お前も愛が必要だと気づいた
vi: Toi nhan ra rang ban cung can tinh yeu

en: Never realize that you need love to spend my life making love to you, oh, oh, oh, I forgot to be a lover
ja: 一生かけて埋め合わせる
vi: Danh ca cuoc doi bu dap cho ban

en: When she starts bringing up older and the fights keep getting worse
ja: 喧嘩がどんどんひどくなって
vi: Va nhung tran cai nhau ngay cang te hon
